name: 沉默结算
description: 每回合结束时检查沉默效果，1回合后解除
skillCode: var piece = context.rulePiece; if (!piece || piece.currentHp <= 0) return { success: false, message: '' }; if (context.playerId !== piece.ownerPlayerId) return { success: false, message: '' }; var tag = piece.statusTags && piece.statusTags.find(function(t) { return t.type === 'naruto-silence'; }); if (!tag) { removeRuleById(piece.instanceId, 'rule-naruto-silence-tick'); return { success: false, message: '' }; } removeStatusEffectById(piece.instanceId, tag.id); return { success: true, message: piece.name + '的沉默效果解除' };
